meaning: 格洛斯特郡[英国英格兰郡名]
examples: One Gloucestershire farmer farms 2,500 acres but does not own any of it.
One Gloucestershire farmer farms 2, 500 acres but does not own any of it.
Soldiers of the English Gloucestershire Regiment battalion stop for afternoon tea.
Gloucestershire Highways said traffic calming was in place and there were signs to prevent goods vehicles.
The Cheltenham-based group said no units were available in Gloucestershire that could meet the company's needs.
